title: <div>And then, so this is day three, so now it's day three when they turn around
content:
And then, so this is day three, so now it's day three when they turn around and they're going back to Texas , after cause them out, there's a fire on the ship like in one of the engines.

But there's like five engines, so one's down, after it's all avoided and the lady comes on.

She's like, okay, nobody worries about it.

You know, one of the engines is out, we've got the firearms of control.

It's safe, everybody go about your business, and you know, go have a drink, go have breakfast, go do whatever .

And about an hour later, all the electricity goes out.

Oh, God.

They lose power on the whole ship.

And then they come to find out that toilets somehow need electric to flush.

So this is a new problem.

Now, I fell asleep in about for about 15 minutes while watching it, so I don't know what happened in this 15 minutes, but I know it was bad. Well, what happened was, is that they the toilets weren't flushing and so they're like, what do we do now?
context: From document: 4320 Mariners Cove Dr 2.m4a — chunk 199 (chunk 199/225)
